name: Name
no_share_content_yet: No box contents for this week yet
reject_warning_title: This will send a rejection email to the applicant.
reject_warning_body: The applicant receives an email with the reason below verbatim. Rejection is recorded immediately and cannot be undone from this screen.
reject_reason_placeholder: Optional — e.g. 'All shares allocated for this season. Please reapply next year.'
reject_abo_warning_title: This will reject the subscription application.
reject_abo_warning_body: The decision is recorded immediately and cannot be undone from this screen. No email is sent automatically today — the office should follow up out of band if needed.
application_pending_subtitle: Thanks for signing up. Your membership hasn't been approved yet — once it is, your subscriptions, deliveries, and payments will appear automatically. You'll receive an email notification automatically.
application_rejected_title: Your application could not be confirmed.
application_rejected_subtitle: Your application was not accepted at this time. Please contact the office if you have any questions.
coop_subscribe_amount_label: How many shares would you like to subscribe?
coop_subscribe_pending_note: Your subscription will be reviewed and confirmed by the office before it takes effect.
coop_subscribe_member_cancelled: A cancelled membership cannot subscribe new shares.
coop_pending_banner: You subscribed {{count}} shares. We're waiting for the office to confirm them.
optin_toggle_failed: Failed to update the on-off delivery — please try again.
edit_bank_details_intro: Set or change this member's IBAN and account owner. For data protection the stored value is shown masked only — click "Change" and re-enter the full value to update it.
no_invitation_description: Member was created manually; user has not yet received an invitation.
invitation_pending_description: Invitation has been sent, but the user has not registered yet.
waiting_list_tooltip: This subscription is on the waiting list because the delivery station or share type was full for the chosen period. It becomes active once the office confirms a freed-up spot.
optin_required: This subscription requires opting in to each delivery.
apply_station_to_future: Apply delivery station to future deliveries as well
cancel_abo_effective_at_hint: Defaults to today. Pick an earlier or later date if the cancellation should take effect another day.
cancel_abo_effective_before_start: Effective date must be on or after the subscription's start date.
cancel_abo_reason_placeholder: Optional — e.g. 'Member moved to another region.'
cancel_abo_warning_title: This ends the subscription on the effective date.
cancel_abo_warning_deliveries: Share deliveries past the effective date are deleted.
cancel_abo_warning_charges: PLANNED charges past the effective date are dropped. Already-issued or paid charges are kept.
cancel_abo_footnote: This cannot be undone via this screen. To restart the membership, create a fresh subscription.
cancel_abo_effective_after_end: Effective date must be on or before the subscription's end date.
cancel_abo_must_be_sunday: Effective date must be a Sunday.
cancel_abo_before_next_sunday: Effective date cannot be in the past — earliest is the next Sunday.
cancel_abo_no_sunday_remaining: No Sunday remains between today and the subscription's end — let the term expire naturally.
cancel_membership_warning_title: This ends the membership on the exit date.
cancel_membership_warning_subs: Active subscriptions block the cancellation — end them first, or tick "Cancel anyway" below to end them together.
cancel_membership_warning_coop: Cooperative shares are cancelled and stay in the cooperative until their payback due date (exit date plus retention period).
cancel_membership_restraint: You can only cancel once you have no active subscriptions. Cancel or let your subscriptions expire first.
cancel_membership_self_hint: You can cancel your membership here once you have no active subscriptions.
cancel_membership_force_hint: Cancels the membership even with active subscriptions — they are ended together (e.g. when a member has died).
cancel_membership_active_subs_error: This member still has active subscriptions. Tick "Cancel anyway" to end the membership and its subscriptions together.
cancel_membership_partial_warning: {{count}} subscription(s) could not be ended — please check their mandates.
